title: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines * Older Adults - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > General Crisis Intervention Hotlines * Older Adults 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Older Adults LGBTQ2+ Individuals Transgender Individuals Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LINES FOR LIFE SENIOR LONELINESS LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support for individuals experiencing loneliness, isolation, depression, or anxiety. Provides active listening, emotional and grief support, information and referrals, and suicide and crisis intervention. 5100 SW Macadam Avenue Suite 400 Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Age 55 and older Hours: 7 days per week 5:30am-11:30pm Email (800) 282-7035 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LINES FOR LIFE SENIOR LONELINESS LINE
